note: Added tests verifying local-time events preserve wall-clock time. Backend: 2 new tests in EventTimestampSerializationTests.cs (roundtrip + multiple event types with edge cases). Frontend: 5 new tests in event_time_display_test.dart (timezone immunity, midnight/late-night edges, multiple event types, formatTimeRange). All backend tests pass (8/8). Flutter tests not runnable (no Dart SDK) but follow existing patterns.
